description_long: This is a classic red fire extinguisher with a cylindrical metal body and a black plastic or rubber carrying handle and lever at the top. A black hose is attached near the top, looping down and secured around the body with a black strap, ending in a metallic nozzle. The front of the extinguisher features a large, detailed white label with red and black text, including instructions, pictograms, and safety information. A round pressure gauge is mounted at the top, just below the handle, with a clear face and colored markings. The extinguisher is designed for quick access and use in emergencies, with a visible safety pin and seal at the handle.
description: A red metal fire extinguisher with a black handle, hose, pressure gauge, and a large instructional label on the front.
description_view_0: Front view showing the instructional label, pressure gauge, black hose, and handle clearly.
description_view_1: Rear view with the label mostly hidden, showing the back of the handle and the hose running down the side.
description_view_2: Side view highlighting the smooth red body, black strap, and the full length of the hose.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the label partially visible and the hose and nozzle facing forward.
attribute_label_or_signage: Large white and red instructional label with text and pictograms on the front of the cylinder.
attribute_mounting_bracket_or_holder: A black strap secures the hose to the body, but no wall bracket or external holder is visible.
attribute_hose_or_nozzle: A black hose is attached near the top, looping down the side and secured with a strap, ending in a metallic nozzle.
attribute_pressure_gauge: A round pressure gauge is present at the top, just below the handle, with a clear face and colored markings.
attribute_safety_pin_or_seal: A metallic safety pin is visible at the top, inserted through the handle mechanism.
